issue.title: chip_loader.py and persona.py FileNotFoundError messages leak internal filesystem paths
issue.actual_behavior: chip_loader.py line 341 raises FileNotFoundError with the full list of search directories embedded in the message: f"Personality chip '{safe_chip_id}' not found in: {[str(p) for p in paths]}". persona.py lines 105 and 183 raise FileNotFoundError with the full absolute path to the persona artifact file. These messages expose internal directory structure and filesystem layout to callers.
issue.expected_behavior: Error messages should identify which chip or artifact was not found without revealing internal search paths or filesystem locations. The chip ID and artifact filename are sufficient for debugging.
repro_steps: Read src/spark_character/chip_loader.py and locate the FileNotFoundError at line ~341.
Observe the error message includes {[str(p) for p in paths]} which dumps all search directories.
Observe the error messages include full artifact paths (e.g., /absolute/path/to/persona.2026.01.md).
issue.affected_workflow: Character chip loading and persona resolution in the Spark character runtime

evidence.before_after_proof:
BEFORE (master): chip_loader.py line 341 raises FileNotFoundError with all search paths: f"Personality chip '{safe_chip_id}' not found in: {[str(p) for p in paths]}". persona.py line 105 raises with full artifact_path. persona.py line 183 raises with full path.

AFTER (PR branch): chip_loader.py raises FileNotFoundError with chip ID only: f"Personality chip '{safe_chip_id}' not found". persona.py lines 105 and 183 raise with filename only: f"Persona artifact not found: persona.{resolved}.md".
forbidden: Do not claim CI passed unless verified

proposed_fix.approach: Replace verbose path-containing error messages with generic messages that identify only the missing resource. In chip_loader.py, remove the {[str(p) for p in paths]} list comprehension from the FileNotFoundError message. In persona.py, replace the full artifact_path / path variables with just the filename (persona.{resolved}.md) in both FileNotFoundError messages.
proposed_fix.tests_or_smoke: All existing tests pass. The changes are purely cosmetic to error message strings and do not affect control flow.

review_claim.duplicate_notes: Searched open PRs and issues in vibeforge1111/spark-character for path-leaking error messages. No known duplicate PRs. This fix sanitizes error strings in chip_loader.py and persona.py.
review_claim.risk_notes: Very low risk. The changes are purely to error message strings - no control flow, no logic changes, no new dependencies. The chip ID and artifact filename are still present in the messages for debugging. No tests need modification.
